hemoglobin.name: Hemoglobin (Hb)
hemoglobin.note: Indian averages often trend on the lower side due to widespread dietary iron deficiency.

total_cholesterol.name: Total Cholesterol
total_cholesterol.note: Desirable is <200. 200-239 is borderline high. >=240 is high risk.

triglycerides.name: Triglycerides
triglycerides.note: Highly sensitive to recent meals and alcohol consumption.

hba1c.name: Glycosylated Hemoglobin (HbA1c)
hba1c.note: A 3-month average of blood sugar. 5.7-6.4 is prediabetes.

tsh.name: Thyroid Stimulating Hormone (TSH)
tsh.note: Testing early morning is best. High TSH indicates underactive thyroid (hypothyroidism).
